## Related Issue

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (no errors)
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes (backend)
- [ ] `black --check .` passes (backend)

### Tests
- [ ] Existing tests still pass
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality (or N/A — explain why)

### Documentation
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Code comments added for non-obvious logic
- [ ] README / API docs updated if applicable

### UI / UX (if frontend change)
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport (375px)
- [ ] Tested on desktop viewport (1280px+)
- [ ] Screenshots / recordings attached below

### Breaking Changes
- [ ] This PR introduces no breaking changes

  *If it does, describe the impact and migration steps:*
